goal: Add request logging middleware to backend/server.py. Each incoming request should log: timestamp, HTTP method, path, status code, and response time in milliseconds. Log to stdout in format: [2026-03-20T00:00:00Z] GET /health 200 12ms. Add a test that makes a request and verifies a log entry is produced.
acceptance_criteria: Every request produces a log line in the specified format
Log includes method, path, status code, and response time
